description: CompositionGrey jacket made of nylon, has a mock collar, long sleeves with Velcro closures on the cuffs, full zippered pocket, two pockets on the sides and stitch detailingFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water below 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring, tumble dry, scrub or dry cleanFlat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsTrust outdoors experts wildcraft to provide great simple designs which will keep you toasty warm. Extremely lightweight, wear this when you brave the elements.Model statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
